---
title: "Team"
format: html
---

## Jenna Baljunas

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/Bio_pic.JPG){width="90%"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}

Hi! This project is part of my PhD dissertation at Michigan State University. There, I am in the [Spatial and Community Ecology (SpaCE) Lab](https://www.communityecologylab.com/), lead by Dr. Phoebe Zarnetske.
